definition: Nhóm các biểu tượng ứng dụng trùng lặp trong các không gian làm việc đang không chọn
context: Group repeated application icons in unfocused workspaces

definition: Nhập tên và mk mạng ẩn

term: Show an outline ring around the focused workspace indicator

context: Show an outline ring around the focused workspace indicator

term: Show workspaces of the currently focused monitor

definition: Màu cửa sổ đang không chọn

term: Highlight the currently focused app inside workspace indicators

context: Highlight the currently focused app inside workspace indicators

term: Show notification popups only on the currently focused monitor

term: Show notifications only on the currently focused monitor
